name: vercel-ai-speech-input
title: Speech Input
author: Vercel
description: A speech capture control with Web Speech and caller-provided MediaRecorder fallback.

changes: Changed Vercel workspace-local shadcn imports to standard consumer aliases.
Added reduced-motion handling to pulse and button transitions.

modifications.change: Changed Vercel workspace-local shadcn imports to standard consumer aliases. Added reduced-motion handling to pulse and button transitions.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied component portable and meet security, accessibility, reduced-motion, and RTL requirements without changing its product role.
